title: Show Timer at top of pulse details sidebars
excerpt: It would be awesome if monday.com showed the timer for pulses in the pulse detail at the top by the title so we can start/pause it without having to scroll horizontally to try to see it in the crack between the panels wh…

posts.author: JoelL (Joel L)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be awesome if monday.com showed the timer for pulses in the pulse detail at the top by the title so we can start/pause it without having to scroll horizontally to try to see it in the crack between the panels while a pulse detail box is open.
